title: OpenEmotion User Affect Classification
description: Represents the detected emotional state of the user from their message. Used for tone modulation only - never triggers high-impact events.

valence.description: Emotional valence: negative (-1.0) to positive (1.0). 0.0 = neutral.

arousal.description: Emotional arousal/energy level: calm (0.0) to excited/agitated (1.0).

confidence.description: Classification confidence. Values < 0.55 indicate uncertainty - should output neutral/uncertain style.

evidence.description: Short evidence strings explaining the classification. Max 3 items.
